message:
fix(service): add PolledAfterCompletion guards to ConcurrencyLimit, RateLimit, and Reconnect futures

ConcurrencyLimit:
- ConcurrencyLimitFuture now tracks `completed` flag; re-polling
  returns ConcurrencyLimitError::PolledAfterCompletion
- Permit is released on the first terminal poll, preventing
  double-release on spurious re-polls that would corrupt the
  semaphore count

RateLimit:
- Add Done state to RateLimitFutureState enum; transitions to Done
  on any terminal result
- Replace unwrap_or fallback with PolledAfterCompletion (previously
  a re-polled Error state would return RateLimitExceeded, which is
  misleading)
- New test and Debug impl for the Done state

Reconnect:
- ReconnectFutureState::Error now holds the error directly instead
  of Option<Error>, eliminating the expect("error future polled
  after completion") panic
- Done state returns PolledAfterCompletion instead of panicking
- New test reconnect_error_polled_after_completion_display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
